schema.title: Response Update Member Role V1 Console Team  Membership Id  Patch

post.description: Rotate an API key, generating a new key while keeping a grace period for the old one.

Provision a mock auth user for E2E testing.

This endpoint is admin-only and creates User + Membership records for
mock auth users in E2E test environments. This enables mock auth users
to access protected console pages without going through the onboarding flow.

schema.title: Response Delete Corpus V1 Corpora  Corpus Id  Delete
Response Delete Model V1 Models  Model Id  Delete

post.description:
Upload multiple files in a single multipart request.

Creates a single ingest_documents_batch job for all files,
enabling batch processing with near-data optimization.

schema.title: Response Delete Document V1 Corpora  Corpus Id  Documents  Doc Id  Delete

post.description:
Start the dataset analysis pipeline.

Rate limiting:
- Maximum 2 runs per day per corpus
- Requires 20% new documents since last analysis (unless new gold labels provided)

get.description: Get current onboarding status for a corpus.
Get detailed results of an analysis run.

post.description: Upload gold labels for a corpus.

get.description: List gold labels for a corpus.

post.description: Start evaluation for a synthetic query batch.

get.description: List evaluation runs for a corpus.

post.description: Start document summarization for a corpus.

get.description: Get summarization coverage and latest job status.

Get an analysis artifact (report only).

artifact_type: "report"

Get all analysis results for dashboard display.

This is the unified endpoint that provides all data needed for the
alignment dashboard UI in a single request.

post.description:
Ingest chunks with precomputed IDs (used for seeding demo/template corpora).

This endpoint intentionally bypasses MinHash deduplication so callers can
seed an exact set of chunks that match prebuilt index artifacts.

get.description:
Get the chunking configuration for a corpus.

Returns the corpus's chunking_config JSONB field merged with env defaults.
Workers use this to ensure consistent chunking across all document ingestion.

schema.title: Response Get Corpus Chunking Config Internal Corpora  Corpus Id  Chunking Config Get

get.description:
Export chunks as JSONL-compatible list for FTK processing.

Returns chunks with element_id, text, and metadata in FTK format.

AnalysisDashboardResponse.title: AnalysisDashboardResponse
AnalysisDashboardResponse.description:
Complete analysis results for dashboard display.

This is the unified response that provides all data needed for the
alignment dashboard UI in a single request.

ChunkingConfig.title: ChunkingConfig
ChunkingConfig.description:
Chunking configuration for document ingestion.

All fields are optional - unset fields inherit from corpus defaults or env defaults.

DatasetAnalysisDetails.title: DatasetAnalysisDetails
DatasetAnalysisDetails.description: Detailed results of a dataset analysis run.

gold_labels.title: Gold Labels
gold_labels.description: Optional gold labels (query-doc pairs) to use for analysis. Providing labels bypasses the 20% document change threshold.

auto_bootstrap.title: Auto Bootstrap
auto_bootstrap.description: Automatically bootstrap if no gold labels exist

DatasetAnalysisRequest.title: DatasetAnalysisRequest
DatasetAnalysisRequest.description:
Request to start dataset analysis pipeline.

The analysis can be triggered with optional inline gold labels, which bypass
the document change threshold (but not the daily limit).

DatasetAnalysisSummary.title: DatasetAnalysisSummary
DatasetAnalysisSummary.description: Summary of a dataset analysis run.

DocumentBatchUploadResponse.title: DocumentBatchUploadResponse
DocumentBatchUploadResponse.description: Response for multipart batch file upload.

E2EProvisionMockUserRequest.title: E2EProvisionMockUserRequest
E2EProvisionMockUserRequest.description: Request to provision a mock auth user for E2E testing.

E2EProvisionMockUserResponse.title: E2EProvisionMockUserResponse
E2EProvisionMockUserResponse.description: Response from provisioning a mock auth user.

EvaluationListResponse.title: EvaluationListResponse
EvaluationListResponse.description: Response listing evaluations for a corpus.

model.title: Model
model.description: LLM model used for grounded generation.

thinking_budget.title: Thinking Budget
thinking_budget.description: Gemini thinking budget (higher = more reasoning, higher latency).

context_top_k.title: Context Top K
context_top_k.description: How many retrieved chunks to include as context for generation. Defaults to the request's top_k.

GoldLabelChunkReference.title: GoldLabelChunkReference
GoldLabelChunkReference.description: Reference to a chunk within a document for gold label resolution.

GoldLabelDocumentReference.title: GoldLabelDocumentReference
GoldLabelDocumentReference.description: Reference to a document for gold label resolution.

chunk_reference.description: Reference to the chunk within the document

relevant_text.title: Relevant Text
relevant_text.description: Simplified mode: text to fuzzy-match to chunks

GoldLabelEntry.title: GoldLabelEntry
GoldLabelEntry.description: A single gold label entry (query-chunk pair).

GoldLabelsListResponse.title: GoldLabelsListResponse
GoldLabelsListResponse.description: Response listing gold labels for a corpus.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional description of the labels source

GoldLabelsUploadRequest.title: GoldLabelsUploadRequest
GoldLabelsUploadRequest.description: Request to upload gold labels for a corpus.

LanguageBridgeItem.title: LanguageBridgeItem
LanguageBridgeItem.description: Language bridge item (lay vs clinical terms).

LexicalStrategy.title: LexicalStrategy
LexicalStrategy.description: Lexical strategy recommendation from Stage 1 analysis.

OnboardingStatusResponse.title: OnboardingStatusResponse
OnboardingStatusResponse.description: Response showing onboarding status for a corpus.

ResolvedLabelInfo.title: ResolvedLabelInfo
ResolvedLabelInfo.description: Information about a resolved gold label.

used_sources.title: Used Sources
used_sources.description: Chunk IDs used for generation in citation order (i.e., [1]..).

score.title: Score
score.description: Human-friendly relevance score between 0 and 1. In dense-only retrieval this is cosine similarity mapped to [0,1]. In other modes it is normalized within the returned results for readability.

raw_score.title: Raw Score
raw_score.description: Underlying retrieval score from the retrieval/rerank pipeline (model-dependent).

SummarizationStatusResponse.title: SummarizationStatusResponse
SummarizationStatusResponse.description: Response showing summarization status for a corpus.

SyntheticQueryBatchResponse.title: SyntheticQueryBatchResponse
SyntheticQueryBatchResponse.description: Response after starting synthetic query generation.

SyntheticQueryBatchSummary.title: SyntheticQueryBatchSummary
SyntheticQueryBatchSummary.description: Summary of a synthetic query batch.

analysis_id.title: Analysis Id
analysis_id.description: Analysis run to use for generation

eval_sample_size.title: Eval Sample Size
eval_sample_size.description: Override eval sample size (None = use backend default, 0 = skip)
